description_long: This bar features a rustic log cabin-style back wall with horizontal wooden logs and a large, dark-framed rectangular display or mirror mounted centrally. The front counter is clad in vertical paneling painted a muted beige, topped with a thick, dark stone countertop that extends outward to provide ample serving space. Two modern bar stools with gray upholstered seats and wooden legs are positioned at the front, inviting patrons to sit. The side panels of the bar include decorative X-bracing, adding a touch of farmhouse or barn-inspired detail. The floor beneath the bar is a light wood, contrasting with the darker tones of the counter and wall. The overall design blends rustic and contemporary elements, making it suitable for urban or themed environments.
description: A rustic log cabin-style bar with a dark stone countertop, beige paneled front, and two modern gray bar stools. Features a large framed display and decorative X-bracing on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the log wall, large framed display, stone countertop, and two gray bar stools.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the countertop, X-bracing detail, and the arrangement of the stools.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full log wall with no visible openings or features except the wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bar's length, X-bracing, and the spatial relationship between the counter and stools.
attribute_architectural_style: Rustic with modern and farmhouse influences
